item.title: Build It Right the First Time: How AI Coding Assistants Make Clean Architecture the Path of Least Resistance
item.description: How AI coding assistants eliminate the tradeoff between clean architecture and development speed, making proper abstractions, testing, and maintainability the fastest way to build.

item.title: Accessible by Default: How AI Coding Assistants Make WCAG Compliance the Way You Build, Not an Afterthought
item.description: A deep dive into WCAG 2.2 principle by principle, mapping each to Apple and Google accessibility guidance, and showing how AI assistants help you build compliance from the ground up.

item.title: Ship Bulletproof Apps: How AI Coding Assistants Turn Debug Menus from Afterthought into Superpower
item.description: AI coding assistants have made it trivially cheap to build production-grade debug menus. This article walks through 15 use cases and how to build them.

item.title: The Claude Code Crash Course: From First Prompt to Autonomous Development Loops
item.description: Everything a developer needs to use Claude Code effectively: prompting, plan mode, worktrees, Ralph loops, Remote Control, agent teams, and multi-device orchestration.

item.title: The Foundation Paradox: Why AI Making Code Easier to Write Makes Your Fundamentals More Valuable, Not Less
item.description: Why strong software engineering fundamentals -- architecture, design patterns, security, scalability -- become more valuable, not less, as AI takes over the act of writing code.
